nasb.text: So Samuel lay down until morning. Then he opened the doors of the house of the Lord. But Samuel was afraid to tell the vision to Eli.

esv.text: Samuel lay until morning; then he opened the doors of the house of the Lord. And Samuel was afraid to tell the vision to Eli.

cnv.text: 撒母耳睡到天亮，他就開了耶和華殿的門。但撒母耳不敢把異象告訴以利。

ccb.text: 撒母耳在床上躺到天亮，然后起来打开耶和华的殿门。他不敢把耶和华的话告诉以利。
